jobDescription: Bird is a last-mile electric vehicle sharing company dedicated to bringing safe, low-cost, environmentally-friendly transportation solutions to communities across the world. We provide a fleet of electric, shared scooters that can be accessed via smartphone. Bird is headquartered in Venice, California and is rapidly expanding across the country and the world. As a General Manager, you’ll be responsible for the growth and success of Bird in your cities. This is one of the most challenging and rewarding roles at Bird, requiring a diverse set of operational, analytical, marketing, community building, and leadership abilities. You’ll manage local teams dedicated to delivering a seamless experience to both riders and their communities and be an influencer of central Bird teams and resources to help deliver on goals and build for scale. If you are up to the task, able to think on your feet, manage through ambiguity/adversity of a quickly shifting and growing industry, and manage and develop high performing teams - all while delivering results, we want to speak with you! What You'll Do Deliver world class fleet operations within your cities, managing all aspects of local operations and optimizing for efficiency and utilization of Bird vehicles Own growth of the business, driving execution to boost rider base, rides, and revenue in a dynamic, highly competitive space Build and develop strong relationships with senior cross-functional leaders (e.g. marketing, government relations, communications, data science, business development) and help define the goals and objectives of these teams at the local level Identify and communicate local product needs to product/engineering teams and playbook and share best practices internally to build for scale across the organization Remove blockers, solve problems, and find a path forward through ambiguity, operating a dynamic and rapidly growing business across urban footprints Represent Bird in the community, local media, and in communication with key city stakeholders Recruit and build a rockstar local ops team; You will be defining hiring needs and leading the hiring process while managing a growing team of Fleet Leads, Fleet Specialists, and Fleet Technicians Create a fun, safe, collaborative, and high energy work culture while developing the next generation of leaders at Bird What You'll Need7+ years of operations management, business consulting, or related experience managing operations, building and developing diverse teams, optimizing processes, and delivering business goals5+ years of people management experience, high EQ, and proven ability to deliver outstanding results through others in a timely manner using a strong sense of focus, organization, and meticulous attention to detail Goal focus with a strong bias toward action BA/ BS with an impressive academic record. MBA or advanced degree is a plus Entrepreneurial hustle and proven self-starter with owner’s mentality; some entrepreneurial experience is preferred Data-driven mindset, strong business judgment, and proven ability to perform analysis, draw key insights, and form and execute a strategy Strong communication and interpersonal skills to build relationships, manage a team, influence stakeholders, and inspire others Excellent organization and time management Willingness to get your hands dirty, lead by example, and motivate teams both through in person and remote management Passion for Bird, its role improving city environments, and an interest in the “share economy” and platform methodology Bird Rides Inc. is an equal employment opportunity employer, and we welcome everyone regardless of their race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status or genetics. We are dedicated to providing an inclusive, open, and diverse work environment.
